description.value: Price 225 gp DETAILS Type poison , inhaled; Save Fortitude DC 13; Onset 1 round; Frequency 1/round for 10 rounds; Cure 1 save EFFECTS Hazemind mist is an inhaled form of hazemind concentrate . It is somewhat weaker (DC 13 save vs. DC 16 for concentrate) but it’s frequency is a bit longer (10 rounds vs. 6 rounds). It otherwise functions as hazemind concentrate .
